# outlaw-skills — Copilot distribution

Generated by `bin/build copilot`. Do not edit by hand — changes will be overwritten.

Copilot reads the open Agent Skills format natively (shipped 2025-12-18), so each
skill ships as a verbatim `SKILL.md` directory under `.github/skills/` — Copilot
auto-activates it by description and also exposes it as a `/<name>` command. No
conversion is performed.

## Install

Two options:

1. **Repo-scoped install** — copy `.github/` into your repo root:
   ```
   cp -r dist/copilot/.github /path/to/your/repo/
   ```
   Skills auto-activate from `.github/skills/`; agents appear in the Copilot Chat
   agent picker; the always-on digest in `.github/copilot-instructions.md` is
   auto-loaded into every Copilot Chat request in that workspace.

2. **User-scoped install (VS Code, macOS)** — symlink the generated skills and
   agents into your personal Copilot directory so they're available everywhere:
   ```
   ln -sfn "$PWD"/dist/copilot/.github/skills/* "$HOME/.copilot/skills/"
   ln -sfn "$PWD"/dist/copilot/.github/agents/*.agent.md "$HOME/.copilot/agents/"
   ```
   Or just run `bin/install --target=copilot`, which does this safely and is
   idempotent. Paths vary by OS and VS Code version; see current VS Code docs
   (`chat.agentSkillsLocations`, `chat.agentFilesLocations`). Reload the VS Code
   window afterward.

## Source

Canonical source lives in the outlaw-skills repo under `src/`. The build
script (`bin/build copilot`) is the only thing that should write to this
directory.

Generated from outlaw-skills v0.1.2.
